final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical infographic showing the step-by-step deployment of Hermes in a Docker container and integration with GLMCodingPlan, labeled clearly as steps 1-2-3-4.

Style/medium: clean technical documentation infographic, flat design suitable for developer tutorials
Composition: vertical 4-step flow layout, each step in its own numbered panel with sequential arrows connecting them, step numbers prominently displayed as 1/2/3/4
Subject: 
  Step 1 panel — Docker environment setup and prerequisites
  Step 2 panel — Hermes container deployment commands and configuration
  Step 3 panel — GLMCodingPlan integration setup and API connection
  Step 4 panel — Verification and testing the deployment
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: neutral developer documentation palette with one accent color for step numbers and key actions
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 1, 2, 3, 4 (step labels), Hermes, GLMCodingPlan, Docker
Constraints: all four steps must be clearly numbered and visually distinct, technical accuracy preserved, readable at standard viewing distance
Avoid: decorative flourishes, unclear step boundaries, missing step numbers, overly artistic styling that obscures technical clarity
